verdict: The Python-3.9 lenstronomy-0.9.2 compatibility probe imports and runs, but it does not recover the public DES J0408 time-delay rows.  It is therefore not evidence for promoting the four failed 57-parameter models or for replacing the existing two-model strict no-T2 baseline.
